From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

[![logo](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/99/Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg/40px-Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg)

Look up ***[Tokyo](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/Tokyo "wiktionary:Tokyo")***, ***[tokyō](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/toky%C5%8D "wiktionary:tokyō")***, ***[tō kyo](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/t%C5%8D_kyo "wiktionary:tō kyo")***, ***[Tôkyô](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/T%C3%B4ky%C3%B4 "wiktionary:Tôkyô")***, ***[Tōkyō](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/T%C5%8Dky%C5%8D "wiktionary:Tōkyō")***, or ***[tōkyō](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/t%C5%8Dky%C5%8D "wiktionary:tōkyō")*** in Wiktionary, the free dictionary.

The **[Tokyo Metropolis](/wiki/Tokyo "Tokyo")** or **Tokyo** (東京, *Tōkyō*) is the capital of Japan.

**Tokyo** may also refer to:

## Places

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tokyo_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Places")]

* [Edo](/wiki/Edo "Edo"), former name of Tokyo until 1868
* [Tokyo Prefecture](/wiki/Tokyo_Prefecture_(1868%E2%80%931943) "Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)"), former Japanese prefecture 1868–1943 that preceded Tokyo
* [Tokyo City](/wiki/Tokyo_City "Tokyo City"), former city within Tokyo Prefecture 1889–1943
* [Special wards of Tokyo](/wiki/Special_wards_of_Tokyo "Special wards of Tokyo"), 23 wards that cover the urban portion of Tokyo
* [Greater Tokyo Area](/wiki/Greater_Tokyo_Area "Greater Tokyo Area"), metropolitan area that covers Tokyo and the surrounding region
* [Little Tokyo, Los Angeles](/wiki/Little_Tokyo,_Los_Angeles "Little Tokyo, Los Angeles"), U.S.A

## People

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tokyo_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: People")]

* [Tokyo Rose](/wiki/Tokyo_Rose "Tokyo Rose"), generic name for female radio broadcasters of Japanese propaganda during World War II
* [Iva Toguri D'Aquino](/wiki/Iva_Toguri_D%27Aquino "Iva Toguri D'Aquino"), American accused of being "the Tokyo Rose" after World War II
* [Tokyo Sexwale](/wiki/Tokyo_Sexwale "Tokyo Sexwale"), South African businessman and former politician

## Films

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tokyo_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Films")]

* *[Tokyo-Ga](/wiki/Tokyo-Ga "Tokyo-Ga")*, a 1985 film by Wim Wenders
* *[Tokyo!](/wiki/Tokyo! "Tokyo!")*, a 2008 film by Michel Gondry, Leos Carax, and Bong Joon-ho

## Literature

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tokyo_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Literature")]

* [Tokyo: A View of the City](/wiki/Tokyo:_A_View_of_the_City "Tokyo: A View of the City"), a 1999 book by [Donald Richie](/wiki/Donald_Richie "Donald Richie")
* [*Tokyo*](/wiki/Tokyo_(novel) "Tokyo (novel)"), a 2004 crime novel by British author [Mo Hayder](/wiki/Mo_Hayder "Mo Hayder")

## Media

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tokyo_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Media")]

* [Tokyo MX](/wiki/Tokyo_MX "Tokyo MX"), a television station based in Tokyo, Japan
* [Tokyo Shimbun](/wiki/Tokyo_Shimbun "Tokyo Shimbun"), a Japanese newspaper
* [TV Tokyo](/wiki/TV_Tokyo "TV Tokyo"), a Japanese television network
  + [BS TV Tokyo](/wiki/BS_TV_Tokyo "BS TV Tokyo"), a Japanese television channel

## Other uses

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tokyo_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: Other uses")]

* [498 Tokio](/wiki/498_Tokio "498 Tokio"), asteroid named after the city
* Tokyo, beer brand from Scottish brewers [BrewDog](/wiki/BrewDog "BrewDog")
* [Tokyō](/wiki/Toky%C5%8D "Tokyō"), bracketing system used in Japanese architecture
* [Tokyo](/wiki/Tokyo_(Money_Heist) "Tokyo (Money Heist)"), fictional character from the television series *Money Heist*
* [Tokyo Tokyo](/wiki/Tokyo_Tokyo "Tokyo Tokyo"), a restaurant in the Philippines specializing [Japanese cuisine](/wiki/Japanese_cuisine "Japanese cuisine")
* [Tokyo Banana](/wiki/Tokyo_Banana "Tokyo Banana"), a sponge cake
